meaning: n.(可乘2人的)微型小客车,玩具小客车
examples: VW has already previewed its electric minicar in the form of 2007's up!
Comparing with the similar cars in the country, the minicar takes the biggest market share.
Even though it is a minicar with just room for two passengers, the interior space does not feel cramped at all.
Fiat's closest competitor is likely the Mini Cooper, from BMW, another iconic minicar reborn.
Last fall Scion added the iQ minicar to its long-extant three-car lineup of xB, xD hatchback, and jaunty tC.
